data: Described by Gualtherus as 'in turre Guttierra la Valle, Barronis del Cugno, in tumulo striate', but already lost in his day (1624); fuller description in Ferrara, at second hand.
Siciliæ obiacentium insular. et Bruttiorum antiquæ tabulæ, cum animadversionib
